Back to the game

About Brikaya

Brikaya is a free arcade game made for quick play, offline access, and simple privacy choices.

Last updated: 2026-07-07

Play How to play FAQ About Legal Privacy Terms Data deletion Support

What the game is

Brikaya is a free circuit component arcade game in your browser. It runs as a web app and can work offline after the first load.

The game does not require a player account. Scores, preferences, and progress stay on the device unless a future version clearly says otherwise.

Free access

Brikaya is offered for free. Optional ads may appear only when they are available and allowed, and they must not block gameplay progress.

Any future store, payment, or account feature must be described before it is used.

Publisher

Brikaya is published by Ricardo Malnati. The official site is https://brikaya.com/.

Player guides

Read How to play for controls and scoring, the FAQ for free play and privacy answers, and Updates for design notes. Those guides are available in English and Brazilian Portuguese.
